post.summary: Change username and receive a new token

get.summary: List items under a path, or the full file record if the path is a file
Download a folder as a zip (excludes trash and .keep)

post.summary: Byte scan all drives, refresh usage only (admin only)
Byte scan a single drive, refresh usage only (admin only)
Drive scan all drives, reconcile files and usage (admin only)
Drive scan a single drive, reconcile files and usage (admin only)

get.summary: Get a user by id (admin only)

patch.summary: Block or unblock a user (admin only)
